creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is not really a bug, but more a feature request encouraged by comment #10
in PR193792: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=193792#c10

It would be nice for portlint to also check that ONLY_FOR_ARCHS is sorted
alphabetically (and NOT_FOR_ARCHS as well).

See revision 439203 for a typical example.
